(ख) इस 灹कार पुनः सं榐यां琈कत उप-ख瀃ड (1) के प瀙चात् िन瀓निलिखत उप-खंड अंत: 瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा, अथा榁त् :- “(2) के瀈灶ीय सरकार के अनुमोदन से, अनु榀ापन 灹ािधकारी समय-समय पर िनया榁त क琉 जाने वाली चाय अपिश瀠ट क琉 灹ितशतता को िविन琖द榁瀠ट कर सक犆गे ।”। [फा. सं. टी-12019/1/2016-बागान(क)] 琈दवाकर नाथ िम炈ा, संयु榉त सिचव -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण : मूल िनयम अिधसूचना सा.का.िन सं榐या 354 तारीख 18 माच榁, 1959 獧ारा 灹कािशत 琈कए गए थे और प瀙चा瀄वत牸 िन瀓निलिखत संशोधन 琈कए गए:- (1) सा.का.िन. 848, तारीख 29 जून, 1961; (2) सा.का.िन. 235, तारीख 04 फरवरी, 1964; (3) सा.का.िन. 457, तारीख 03 अ灹ैल, 1975; (4) सा.का.िन. 507, तारीख 24 माच榁, 1979; (5) सा.का.िन. 1318, तारीख 03 नव瀓बर, 1979; (6) सा.का.िन. 763(अ), तारीख 23 琈दस瀓बर, 1998; (7) सा.का.िन. 629(अ) तारीख 31 अग瀡त, 2001; (8) सा.का.िन. 167(अ), तारीख 05 माच榁, 2002; (9) का.आ. 3320(अ), तारीख 25 अ猴ूबर, 2016 और (10) का.आ. 4028(अ), तारीख 20 अग瀡त, 2018 । MINISTRY OF COMMERCE AND INDUSTRY (Department of Commerce) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 31st October, 2019 S.O. 3954(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (3) and (5) of section 30 of the Tea Act, 1953 (29 of 1953), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments further to amend the Tea Waste (Control) Order, 1959, namely:- 1. Short title and commencement.—(1) This Order may be called the Tea Waste (Control) Amendment Order, 2019. (2) It shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Tea Waste (Control) Order, 1959, (hereinafter referred to as the principal Order), in clause 3, the provisos shall be omitted. 3. In the principal Order, clause 4 shall be renumbered as sub-clause (1) of that clause and, (a) in sub-clause (1) as so renumbered, for item (c), the following shall be substituted, namely;- “(c) by utilising in the manufacture of caffeine, instant tea, bio nutrient and bio fertilizer: Provided that the procedure of denaturing of tea waste for the manufacture of caffeine shall be specified by the licensing authority with the approval of the Board from time to time;”; (b) after sub-clause (1) as so renumbered, the following sub-clause shall be inserted, namely:- “(2) The licensing authority, with the approval of the Central Government, may specify the percentage of tea waste to be exported from time to time.”. [F. No. T-12019/1/2016-Plant(A)] DIWAKAR NATH MISRA, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal rules were published vide notification number G.S.R. 354 dated the 18th March, 1959 and subsequently amended as follows:- (1) G.S.R. 848 dated the 29th June, 1961; (2) G.S.R. 235 dated the 4th February, 1964; (3) G.S.R. 457 dated the 3rd April, 1975; (4) G.S.R. 507 dated the 24th March, 1979; (5) G.S.R. 1318 dated the 3rd November, 1979; (6) G.S.R. 763 dated the 23rd December, 1998; (7) G.S.R. 629 dated the 31st August, 2001; (8) G.S.R. 167 dated the 5th March, 2002; (9) S.O. 3320 (E) dated the 25th October, 2016; and (10) S.O. 4028 (E) dated the 20th August, 2018. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
